boosters.description: Use Magnet after a miss to quickly <color=#FBD000>re-aim and hit</color> tricky blocks or chests.
Use Shield to <color=#FBD000>protect the ball</color> — shields catch missed shots so you don't immediately lose.
2X Ball creates extra balls from every active ball. <color=#FBD000>Each ball splits into two,</color> increasing hits and chaos.
3X Ball creates extra balls from every active ball. <color=#FBD000>Each ball splits into three,</color> increasing hits and chaos.
<color=#FBD000>fires bullets continuously. </color>Bullets smash obstacles and clear a path.
Use Wide Paddle to <color=#FBD000>Control the ball </color>and prevent drops.
Get one <color=#FBD000>extra life at the start of the level.</color> This helps you survive mistakes and keep playing longer.
